title: QuickSplash
description: Automatically detects and throws all Instant Damage II splash potions in your inventory with a fully configurable delay for optimal combat timing and Trajectories.
body: This mod automatically calculates accurate trajectories and throws Instant Damage II splash potions at the optimal moment, using a fully configurable delay system. Designed for PvP scenarios, it improves consistency and precision while remaining lightweight and easy to use.
